currentObjective: Implement DASHBOARD-TABS-V1: tabbed dashboard with Students, Progress, Rewards, and Account sections, diagnostic badge on child cards, and ?tab= routing.

product.problemStatement: The parent dashboard is a single flat page. Rewards live on a dead-end /rewards URL that many parents never find. The diagnostic placement test ran but there is no visual indicator that a child still needs it. Parents have no structured navigation, so everything is buried in one scroll.
product.user: Parent managing 1-3 children aged 5-14, checking learning progress, adjusting settings, or managing subscription.
useCases: Parent opens dashboard and sees four clear tabs: Students, Progress, Rewards, Account
Parent sees a Diagnostic pending badge on a child card if diagnosticComplete is false
Parent clicks Rewards tab and sees the full rewards view without navigating away
Parent clicks Account tab and sees subscription status, billing button, sign-out
Child card retains all existing stats such as streak, stars, coins, and difficulty bars
nfrs: Tab switch must feel instant - no full page reload, client-side state only
Active tab persists in URL query param (?tab=rewards) so deep-linking works
Mobile-first - tabs must work on small screens
No new API calls needed for this chunk - all data already loaded on dashboard
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard renders with 4 tabs: Students, Progress, Rewards, Account
Students tab shows existing child profile cards unchanged
Rewards tab shows the same content currently at /rewards/page.tsx inline
Account tab shows subscription banner, manage billing button, and sign out
Child card shows amber Diagnostic pending badge when child.diagnosticComplete === false
?tab= query param updates on tab change and restores active tab on reload
Suite 13 tests cover tab navigation, diagnostic badge visibility, and rewards tab content
antiScope: Do NOT build the Progress tab data yet - that needs /api/progress/topics in a future chunk
Do NOT change /rewards/page.tsx URL - it can stay and also render inline on dashboard
Do NOT add any new API endpoints in this chunk

codexTasks: Refactor app/dashboard/page.tsx - add tab state and tab bar component
Students tab: move existing child profile grid into Students tab content
Rewards tab: import and render rewards content inline
Account tab: move subscription banner, manage billing, and sign-out into Account tab
Progress tab: render placeholder Coming soon until the data layer exists
Child card: add amber badge Diagnostic pending when child.diagnosticComplete === false
Wire ?tab= query param to active tab state
claudeTasks: Write Suite 13 - tab navigation tests, diagnostic badge, rewards tab, account tab content
Verify all existing tests still pass after dashboard refactor
Security check - no new data exposed in tab views that was not already accessible

mergePolicy: No merge without explicit user approval.

workstreams.goal: Implement DASHBOARD-TABS-V1 with a tabbed dashboard, diagnostic badge on child cards, and query-param navigation.
chunks: Add tab routing and section state
Split dashboard into Students, Progress, Rewards, and Account sections
Add diagnostic badges and preserve existing actions
Smoke test and hand off to Claude

workstreams.goal: Add a LangGraph orchestration plan and map product/test/security/housekeeping roles onto the repo-native contract.

coordinationRules: Read the shared task, ownership, status, handoff, and message files before starting new work.
Poll the other agent every 5 seconds while actively working.
Update your own status every 30-60 seconds and on every blocker change.
Keep write scopes disjoint unless the task explicitly says otherwise.
Product owns requirements quality, use cases, and non-functional expectations before implementation starts.
